Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Entries Of Default, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, And Declaration Of Daniel A. Garcia
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Build Group, Inc.'s motion to set aside the entries of default against it is granted. While it was not proper for Build Group to include additional language in the proposed order it submitted to Judge Lam beyond what was stated in the tentative ruling, Judge Lam nonetheless signed the order and that order extended the dates for Build Group to file responsive pleadings. That order was valid, at least until it was vacated, which did not occur. Accordingly, the defaults of Build Group should not have been entered and Build Group is entitled to have those defaults set aside. Build Group has until May 18, 2017 to file responsive pleadings. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
